title: Grant Thornton India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Grant Thornton India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grant Thornton India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Grant Thornton India:
Grant Thornton India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grant Thornton India!
